evals.name: strong-feature-notifications
evals.prompt: We keep pasting smtplib snippets into auth, metrics, and reports — every service has its own ad-hoc email helper and now we want slack alerts too. Plus the metrics team wants pager-style SMS for after-hours alerts. Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill to scope a shared notifications capability — email + slack now, SMS plausible later. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox; survey docs/notes/ for real ids.
evals.expectation: Should mint sp###.md with ## problem describing capability + consumers (auth/metrics/reports) + migration of adr0003 ad-hoc smtplib. board.md ## idea appended. NO new ft###.md. Should raise the granularity question (one notif feature vs router+transports).

evals.name: route-to-extend-saml
evals.prompt: We need to add SAML SSO to our auth — basic-auth (ft001) only does password+TOTP today and the new external partner integration needs SAML. Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Skill should detect ft001 already exists in the same surface area and re-route to idea-extend on ft001. No new sp### emitted under docs/notes/spec/. board.md unchanged.

evals.name: route-to-implement-single-consumer
evals.prompt: Add a quarterly retention purge tool — only the platform-engineer persona uses it, and only once a quarter when legal asks for the deletion proof. Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Skill should detect single consumer (pn002, no other plausible consumers) and re-route to idea-implement as im### glue. No new sp### emitted under docs/notes/spec/. board.md unchanged.

evals.name: granularity-decompose-observability
evals.prompt: We need a unified observability stack — metrics scraping, structured logging, distributed tracing, alerting, and dashboards. One feature to replace our current mess (stdout logs, ad-hoc prometheus calls, zero tracing). Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Skill should flag the ask is too coarse — 3-5 distinct capabilities. Either splits into multiple sp### proposals or surfaces the granularity question explicitly in ## problem. Should NOT silently scope one monolithic ft### shape.
